name: LLM Inference Engineer
summary: Push the boundaries of open-weight LLM inference on the world's most-used model hub.
description: Join the Inference team to ship faster, cheaper, and more reliable inference for open models. You will work on Text Generation Inference, contribute kernels for new GPU generations, and partner with model authors to optimise serving at scale.

name: Research Scientist, Open Models
summary: Train the next generation of small, fast, fully open-weight foundation models.
description: Research Scientists at Mistral own the full model lifecycle: data curation, training, evaluation, and release. You will publish open models and papers, and contribute to the open science community.

name: Developer Advocate, Agents
summary: Help the world's builders ship production agents on top of LangChain and LangGraph.
description: Own the developer experience for our agent framework: write tutorials, run workshops, engage with the OSS community, and feed the roadmap with field feedback.

name: Open Source Engineering Intern
summary: 12-week internship working directly on the Ollama runtime and Modelfile ecosystem.
description: Ship real features to a 1M+ user open source project. You'll pair with senior engineers on model packaging, GPU support, and the next generation of the Ollama API.

name: Contract Audio ML Engineer
summary: 6-month contract to improve open audio model evaluation and release tooling.
description: Build out evaluation harnesses for open audio models, contribute results to Papers With Code, and help ship the next major open-weights release.

name: Diffusion Model Trainer
summary: Train the next open-weights image and video diffusion models.
description: Own end-to-end training runs for Stable Diffusion and Stable Video. Design data pipelines, run large-scale ablations, and release everything open.

name: AI Privacy Researcher (Part-Time)
summary: Investigate privacy properties of on-device LLM tooling for the Firefox ecosystem.
description: 20 hours/week role auditing local-first AI stacks, writing reports, and collaborating with Firefox engineers on privacy-by-design integrations.

name: Search & Retrieval Engineer
summary: Improve answer quality for the open-source Sonar models by reinventing retrieval.
description: Build hybrid retrieval pipelines combining sparse, dense, and learned rerankers. Publish open evals and contribute to the Sonar model family.
